rulings.Case Title: ROBERT MOSTOVOY et al VS. ELIZABETH CRETARA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 27, 2014, line 1. PLAINTIFFs ROBERT MOSTOVOY and LINDA MOSTOVOY's MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES GRANTED in the amount of $9,000. Plaintiff as the prevailing party on its motion to enforce settlement agreement. 9 of Settlement agreement provides for recovery of attorney's fees. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: RIMMA BOROKHOV et al VS. FREEDOM WEST HOMES, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication Of The Complaint Of Plaintiff Rimma Borokhov
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 27, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANT ANASON PAK's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, Alternatively, For Summary Adjudication Of The Complaint Of Plaintiff Rimma Borokhov Continued to March 6, 2014. Moving party shall provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to department 501 no later than February 27, 2014 by 4 pm with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: 1369 HYDE STREET, LTD VS. WILLIAM B. REILLY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn Compelling Cross-Defendant To Respond To Discovery Or In The Alternative To Provide Further Response; Compelling Deft To Appear For Deposition; Setting Hearing For A Motion To Have Admissions Deemed Admittted; For An Award Of Sanctions;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 27, 2014, line 3. CROSS COMPLAINANTs BARBARA REILLY, MEGHAN REILLY and WILLIAM REILLY's Motion Compelling Cross-Defendant To Respond To Discovery Or In The Alternative To Provide Further Response; Compelling Deft To Appear For Deposition; Setting Hearing For A Motion To Have Admissions Deemed Admittted; For An Award Of Sanctions; DENIED. Requests for sanctions are denied. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: GABRIELA GEYER et al VS. MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To Plaintiffs' Thirteenth Cause Of Action For Unfair Business Practices
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 27, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANT MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To Plaintiffs' Thirteenth Cause Of Action For Unfair Business Practices The Court declines to rule on the issue of class allegations at this time. This issue should be addressed by a class certification motion when evidence can be presented and considered. See Reply 2:12-16. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: NIKKO BRAVO VS. ARTHUR STEVEN BROWN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 27, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT NORMAN SABEL's Motion For Protective Order GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Discovery is stayed as to Defendant Norma Sabel only and as to the matters related to the pending criminal charges only. Parties are to meet and confer as to the scope of the "matters related to criminal charges." Norman Sable may make good faith objections to propounded discovery as "matters related to criminal charges." = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: EDWIN KEITH STEPHENS et al VS. CAL-WESTERN RECONVEYANCE CORP. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 27, 2014, line 6. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to March 27, 2014. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and C and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers, reply and operative complaint to Department 501 no later than March 7, 2014 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: CARLOS ROSADO et al VS. TINA DIAMOS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs' Objections To And Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Defendants' Memorandum To Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 27, 2014, line 7. PLAINTIFFs CARLOS ROSADO, LISSETTE OSORIO, YOLANI LANZA and JOSEPH GLASS Objections To And Motion To Strike Defendants' Memorandum To Tax Costs Defendants are the prevailing party. The liability for the costs to be determined upon the resolution of the action. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: AMY HOWER et al VS. ADAM CLAMMER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Adam Clammer, Kate Harbin'S Motion To Strike Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 27, 2014, line 8. Defendant Adam Clammer and Kate Harbin's Motion To Strike Complaint GRANTED with leave to amend to allege facts re: malice, oppression or fraud. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: AMY HOWER et al VS. ADAM CLAMMER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 27, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANTs ADAM CLAMMER and KATE HARBIN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Complaint sufficiently alleges all causes of action against all defendants and is not uncertain. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: IRMA ENCINAS VS. OONA HANAWALT et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 27, 2014, line 9. DEFENDANTs OONA HANAWALT and B. ALISON PANKO's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Continued to March 4, 2014 per situation of the parties. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: 1625 P, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY VS. JACQUELINE MARENCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff 1625 Llc'S Further Responses To Request For Admissions, Set Two, Nos. 2, 5-7, And Request For Production Of Documents, Set Two, Nos. 1-4, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff 1625 P Llc, And Its Attorney
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, February 27, 2014, line 10.
